title: Agbaje Gives Insight to “A Digital only Africa A Vision for 2030” at Infosys Finacle 2024 Nigeria Banking Connect - FinancialEDGE
description: Infosys Finacle, the industry leader in digital banking solutions, hosted the Finacle Nigeria Banking Connect 2024in partnership with IBM and CWG on February 24 at the Eko Hotel, Lagos. Over 200 senior bankers representing all the leading banks in Nigeria attended the event. The conference theme: Recomposing Banking had sessions covering the benefits of a
html: Infosys Finacle, the industry leader in digital banking solutions, hosted the Finacle Nigeria Banking Connect 2024in partnership with IBM and CWG on February 24 at the Eko Hotel, Lagos. Over 200 senior bankers representing all the leading banks in Nigeria attended the event.
